DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND TO (35) INTERROGATORIES BY AUGUST 27, 1999 AT NOON - COMMISSIONER HEWLETT, JR.

ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY - COMMISSIONER HEWLETT, JR. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND BY AUGUST 27, 1999 AT NOON.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHLUWALIA, HARPAL SINGH AHLUWALIA, MANINDERJET K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2516 19TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-15-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR NUMEROUS CONDITIONS.
